title: NUPTIO 2 Pcs Metal Hexagon Shaped Geometric Design Tea Light Votive Candle Holders, Iron Hollow Tealight Candle Holders for Vintage Wedding Home Decoration, Gold Christmas Candle Holder Decor (S + L)
features: DIMENSION: Size S measures 8cm High by 11cm Wide at the Base; Size L measures 18cm High by 14cm Wide at the Base. The gold metal is constructed in a popular geometric design, with triangles connected together in a cut-out 6 sided hexagon shape.
PACKAGE INCLUDES: 1 pcs size S and 1 pcs size L geometric design gold metal tealight candle holders.

MATERIAL:These modern and on trend tea light holders are made of all metal and are plated in a stunning metallic gold metal finish. Anti rust and easy to clean for long time use. Great home table decoration as well as tealight holder.
DETAILS: Base has a solid metal bottom cup for placement of a wax or flamless led tea light or votive candle. Open top for ventilation

GREAT HOME DECORATION: Be at the cutting-edge with trendy favors that will thrill your guests. They are certain to use these geometric tea light holders at home - they will look great on a coffee or dining table.
